title: Lamb and Savory Pie
description: A hearty, flavorful pie filled with lamb, savory spices, and a smoky twist.
instructions: Roll out pie crust and place in a 9-inch pie dish.
In a large skillet, cook lamb over medium-high heat until browned, breaking into small pieces as it cooks.
Add savory spice mix, smoky paprika, onion, and carrots to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Transfer lamb mixture to the pie crust and spread evenly.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
